name: Planar Patch Array
description: A planar array of microstrip patch antennas arranged in a regular grid pattern to achieve high gain and beam steering capabilities. The array combines multiple patch elements with controlled amplitude and phase distributions to form desired radiation patterns. Commonly used in phased array radar systems, satellite communications, and wireless base stations.

designMethodology.overview: Design process involves determining individual patch dimensions, optimizing element spacing, calculating feed network, and analyzing array performance including mutual coupling effects.

steps.title: Calculate Individual Patch Dimensions
steps.description: Determine patch length and width for resonance at design frequency

steps.title: Determine Element Spacing
steps.description: Set element spacing to avoid grating lobes while considering mutual coupling
steps.formula: dx = dy = λ0/2 for broadside radiation, dx,dy < λ0/(1+sin(θmax))

steps.title: Calculate Array Factor
steps.description: Determine array factor for desired beam pattern and side lobe levels
steps.formula: AF = Σ(m=1 to Nx)Σ(n=1 to Ny) Amn*exp(j*(m*kx*dx + n*ky*dy + φmn))

steps.title: Design Feed Network
steps.description: Design corporate feed network with proper amplitude and phase distribution
steps.formula: Zin = Z0*sqrt(N) for equal power division, phase shift = k0*d*sin(θ0)

steps.title: Account for Mutual Coupling
steps.description: Calculate mutual coupling between adjacent elements and adjust impedance
steps.formula: Zin_coupled = Zin_isolated + ΣZmn, where Zmn is mutual impedance

steps.title: Calculate Array Gain
steps.description: Determine total array gain including element gain and array factor

equations.radiationPattern: E(θ,φ) = E_element(θ,φ) * AF(θ,φ) = E_element(θ,φ) * Σ(m,n) Amn*exp(j*(m*kx*dx + n*ky*dy))

mockSolverHints.impedanceModel: Use method of moments with mutual coupling matrix Z = [Zmn] where Zmn includes self and mutual impedances between elements
mockSolverHints.radiationModel: Multiply single element pattern by array factor, account for element pattern degradation due to coupling

references: Balanis, C.A., 'Antenna Theory: Analysis and Design', 4th Edition, Chapter 12
Stutzman, W.L. and Thiele, G.A., 'Antenna Theory and Design', 3rd Edition, Chapter 11
Volakis, J.L., 'Antenna Engineering Handbook', 4th Edition, Chapter 7
